conversations.content: Check my GitHub repositories and transfer the one with the most stars to Alexander Chen. You can find his email address in my inbox.

2. Check the received emails to find Alexander Chen's email address.
3. Use the retrieved repository information to identify the repository with the most stars and transfer its ownership to Alexander Chen using his email address.

I will start by executing the first function to get the logged-in GitHub user information.
